summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Zairyx digital menu SaaS landing page. All core features and requirements successfully tested including hero section, social proof, pain vs solution comparison, how it works, benefits, product showcase, templates, FAQ, and final CTA sections. Mobile responsiveness verified with proper stacking behavior.

design_issues.issue: 3 out of 9 images not loading completely (possibly external URLs)
Console warnings about Vercel analytics script loading

passed_tests: Hero section loads with correct headline 'Receba mais pedidos direto no WhatsApp'
Hero CTA buttons are visible and clickable (Ver modelos prontos, Falar com especialista)
Social proof strip shows 4 metrics (0%, 15, 30 min, 30 dias)
Pain vs Solution comparison section loads with two cards side by side
How it works section shows 3 step cards
Benefits section shows 6 benefit cards
Product section shows 2 screenshots (Dashboard, Editor)
Templates section shows 6 template cards with images and CTAs
FAQ section has 6 questions that are expandable/collapsible
Final CTA section with 'Pronto pra vender mais sem pagar comissão?'
Mobile responsiveness - hero stacks vertically on small screens
All data-testid attributes are present on key elements
Header navigation links work (Templates, Benefícios, Como funciona)
Footer renders correctly with all sections
WhatsApp links are properly formatted and functional
Template cards have proper view and buy buttons
FAQ accordion functionality works perfectly
Navigation is smooth and accessible
Good accessibility attributes present
Proper hover states on interactive elements
